# AIVancePro

> AI-powered personal fitness coach app for iOS and Android. Personalized workout programs, real-time progress tracking, and an intelligent coach that adapts to your goals.

## About

AIVancePro is a mobile fitness application built by AS Corporation. It uses artificial intelligence to create personalized strength training programs, track workout progress, and provide real-time coaching. Available in French, English, and German.

- Website: https://aivancepro.fr
- iOS App: https://apps.apple.com/app/aivancepro/id6756116760
- Android App: Coming soon on Google Play

## Key Features

- AI-generated personalized workout programs
- 240+ exercises with video demonstrations
- Real-time progress tracking and statistics
- AI coach chat for fitness advice
- Workout session logging with sets, reps, and weight
- Personal records tracking
- Community features and challenges
- Referral program (7 days free premium per invite)
- Shareable workout summary cards

## Pricing

- Free plan: Session tracking, 240+ exercises, basic statistics
- Pro plan: 6.99 EUR/month — Unlimited AI coach, personalized programs, advanced statistics, detailed analytics

## Competitors

AIVancePro differentiates from Fitbod, Hevy, Strong, JEFIT, and Alpha Progression by offering a full AI coach experience — not just a workout tracker, but an intelligent assistant that builds programs, adapts to progress, and provides real-time advice.

## Languages

- French (default): https://aivancepro.fr/
- English: https://aivancepro.fr/en/
- German: https://aivancepro.fr/de/
